top_signals.title: Shein wins Chinese approval for long-awaited IPO
top_signals.summary: China’s securities regulator grants permission for fast-fashion retailer to list its shares in Hong Kong after years of delays
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: La dette cachée freine le développement du Sénégal: Next Africa
top_signals.summary: Les grands projets d’infrastructure devaient incarner la transformation du Sénégal en l’une des économies les plus dynamiques d’Afrique de l’Ouest.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix Indicated to Climb 17% After $26.5 Billion ADR Offering
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix Inc.’s American depositary receipts are indicated to open 17% above their offering price, after the South Korean memory chipmaker raised $26.5 billion in the largest-ever US listing by a foreign company.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: These are America's 10 cheapest states for 2026, where you can still beat inflation
top_signals.summary: These are America's cheapest states to live in for 2026, where residents can still beat inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: These are America's 10 most expensive states for 2026, where inflation is punishing residents
top_signals.summary: These 10 U.S. states are the most expensive places to live in America in 2026, with inflation punishing residents to an extreme degree.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: UK financial regulators to extend oversight to four big US cloud services groups
top_signals.summary: Designating Microsoft, Google, Amazon and Oracle as ‘critical third parties’ will help improve resilience, says Treasury
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Over 70% of accommodations in Japan say they are understaffed amid tourism influx
top_signals.summary: Solving the issue is crucial to developing tourism sustainably as a strategic industry for Japan, the government said in a white paper released Friday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Japan and India must harness middle-power momentum in the Indo-Pacific
MiCA licensing only the beginning as crypto custodians face scrutiny
top_signals.summary: A MiCA license allows crypto firms to operate in the EU, but the ESMA’s review will test whether custodians can meet the required security and resilience standards.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
